title: Landau level spectroscopy of PbSnSe topological crystalline insulator
classification_notes: GPT error: Expecting value: line 182 column 7 (char 11065)

paper_analysis.summary: The paper reports infrared magneto-spectroscopy measurements on Pb1-xSnxSe topological crystalline insulator samples and interprets the Landau-level spectra with a massive Dirac-electron model.
paper_analysis.processed_plot_details: The paper reports infrared magneto-spectroscopy measurements and Landau-level spectra for Pb1-xSnxSe samples, but no accompanying dataset or source data files were located.

dataset_characterization.data_organization: No data availability statement was found, and no downloadable data files or repository links were identified on the publisher page.
